tags.label: GenerativeArtGallery — artwork7 (Circuit Poem)
tags.description: Adapted from the grid energy propagation sketch. A grid of nodes (circle), power nodes (square), and relay nodes (rotated square at 45°) propagates energy outward each frame at configurable decay and spawn rates. Energy lights wires between adjacent cells proportionally. Glow halos scale with energy level. Grid rebuilds on density change. Three node types have different propagation multipliers.
